description: Compact synthetic retrieval baseline for Milestone 1.5F. This is not a generated report and does not claim real semantic quality.
notes: Fixtures are synthetic and intentionally small.
No-answer queries use empty expected arrays and assert that no expected match should be invented.
Answerability metrics connect no-answer fixtures to deterministic abstention policy but remain non-blocking initially.
Mock vector and hybrid modes validate the retrieval pipeline, not semantic model quality.
pgvector evaluation remains opt-in and outside the required gate.
